2025-26 Tennessee Volunteers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 25-12 (11-7, 4th in SEC MBB)

Rank: 12th in the Final AP Poll

Coach: Rick Barnes

PS/G: 78.8 (101st of 365)

PA/G: 69.6 (66th of 365)

SRS: 21.97 (16th of 365)

SOS: 12.70 (9th of 365)

ORtg: 115.8 (57th of 365)

DRtg: 102.1 (62nd of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +4000

NCAA Tournament: (#6 seed in Midwest)
Won Midwest First Round (78-56) versus #11 Miami (OH)
Won Midwest Second Round (79-72) versus #3 Virginia
Won Midwest Regional Semifinal (76-62) versus #2 Iowa State
Lost Midwest Regional Final (95-62) versus #1 Michigan
